risks.description: high-criticality service "api-gateway" synchronously depends on 3 services; a slowdown in any of them propagates to this critical path
risks.mitigation: Introduce timeouts and circuit breakers on each synchronous call, and convert non-essential dependencies to asynchronous events so the critical path can complete degraded.

risks.description: high-criticality service "order-service" synchronously depends on 5 services; a slowdown in any of them propagates to this critical path
risks.mitigation: Introduce timeouts and circuit breakers on each synchronous call, and convert non-essential dependencies to asynchronous events so the critical path can complete degraded.

risks.description: high-criticality service "api-gateway" declares no resilience controls (retry, circuit_breaker, timeout, bulkhead)
risks.mitigation: Add explicit timeout, retry-with-backoff, and circuit-breaker policies on outbound calls; isolate critical work with bulkheads so one slow dependency cannot exhaust shared resources.

risks.description: high-criticality service "auth-service" declares no resilience controls (retry, circuit_breaker, timeout, bulkhead)
risks.mitigation: Add explicit timeout, retry-with-backoff, and circuit-breaker policies on outbound calls; isolate critical work with bulkheads so one slow dependency cannot exhaust shared resources.

risks.description: data store "analytics-db" is accessed by 2 components; shared stores couple deployment, scaling, and failure domains and erode service ownership
risks.mitigation: Give the data store a single owning service; other components access it through that service's API or via published events, not direct connections.

risks.description: data store "reservations-cache" is accessed by 2 components; shared stores couple deployment, scaling, and failure domains and erode service ownership
risks.mitigation: Give the data store a single owning service; other components access it through that service's API or via published events, not direct connections.

next_steps: Introduce timeouts and circuit breakers on each synchronous call, and convert non-essential dependencies to asynchronous events so the critical path can complete degraded.
Add explicit timeout, retry-with-backoff, and circuit-breaker policies on outbound calls; isolate critical work with bulkheads so one slow dependency cannot exhaust shared resources.
Give the data store a single owning service; other components access it through that service's API or via published events, not direct connections.
risk_rating: Severe risk; the architecture needs rework before it is operable
summary: Architecture risk report for ecommerce-order-platform: 12 services analyzed, 6 risks identified, risk-posture score 31/100.
